name: CTCI Advanced Systems Inc.
summary: CTCI Advanced Systems Inc. provides system integration services to the hydrocarbon, power, industry, transportation, and high technology markets in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides main automation contractor services in the areas of project planning, design, procurement, installation, test, commissioning, start up, and running or turnkey projects. It also offers railway electrical and mechanical (E&M) solutions, such as signaling, telecommunications, SCADA, and related information system solutions; airport and satellite E&M services for airport terminal, airfield runway, and satellite industries; and hi-tech plant E&M services for wafer, electro-optical, display glass, or bio-tech plants. In addition, the company provides process simulation and IT systems, including process optimization, energy saving and waste reduction, facility reliability, and plant safety and emergency planning products and services, as well as distributes and maintains SmartPlant P&ID intelligent solutions, plant EPC projects engineering information management solutions, and visualize plant's engineering information management solutions. Further, it offers smart water network platform integrated with GIS to manage and monitor water network; cyber security software for detecting the abnormal signs caused by equipment malfunction, operational mistake, and cyber-attack; construction safety management platform; and rotary machine predictive maintenance platform to collect sound and vibration data of rotary machines, and build baseline models to analyze machine condition. Additionally, the company distributes NovaTech D/3 DCS and batch control management systems; Intergraph Process, Power & Marine - PP&M products and solutions; AspenTech process optimization software; and Mr. Energy 50001, an energy information management system platform. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
